OverOns.title: Who am I?
OverOns.bioParagraph1:
Hey there!



I'm Senne, owner of SDE. I help ambitious entrepreneurs with modern websites that truly deliver conversions.
OverOns.bioParagraph2:
I'm passionate about web development. At SDE, everything comes down to one thing: results.



I don't build websites just to look pretty (although that certainly helps), but to turn visitors into customers.
OverOns.value1Description: Every project starts with one goal: growing your business. From the first conversation to launch and beyond.
OverOns.value2Description: I work with the latest tools and frameworks so you get a lightning-fast website.
OverOns.value3Description: Direct contact with me, the owner. No middlemen, no salespeople. Just someone who's genuinely invested in your success.
OverOns.value4Description: No templates or standard solutions. Every project is unique and fully tailored to your brand and goals.
OverOns.approachText: Every project is unique, but my process is always clear and structured:
OverOns.step1Description: We plan a no-obligation call where I get to know your business, target audience and ambitions. What do you want to achieve? What are your challenges?
OverOns.step2Description: I work out a strategy that perfectly matches your goals. You get a clear proposal with timeline and investment.
OverOns.step3Description: I get to work building and optimizing. You stay in the loop through regular updates and previews.
OverOns.step4Description: After launch I keep monitoring and optimizing, so your website keeps performing.
OverOns.ctaText: Let's get in touch and see how I can help your business grow with a modern website.

Contact.title: Get in touch
Contact.subtitle: Let's get in touch and discuss how I can help your business grow.
Contact.successMessage: Thanks! We'll be in touch within 24 hours.

Contact.callInstead: Or call directly for a no-obligation chat

hero.description: Optimized for speed and user experience.

features.heading: Websites that make an <accent>impression</accent>
features.feature1Description: Modern technologies for fast, reliable websites.
features.feature3Description: Perfect on every device. Mobile-first design for the best user experience.
features.feature4Description: Built with SEO best practices for better search engine visibility.
features.feature5Description: SSL certificates, regular updates and backups for maximum security.
features.feature6Description: Unique design that perfectly matches your brand and audience.

process.heading: From concept to <accent>live website</accent>
process.subheading: Our step-by-step process for a successful collaboration
process.step1Description: We analyze your goals, target audience and competitors.
process.step2Description: We create a detailed plan for your website.
process.step3Description: We build your website with modern technologies.
process.step4Description: Extensive testing across different devices and browsers.
process.step5Description: We launch your website and make sure everything works perfectly.

performance.heading: Performance you can <accent>measure</accent>
performance.quote: "A fast website isn't a luxury anymore, it's a necessity. Every second counts for your customers."

benefits.item1: Unique design that strengthens your brand

hero.description: Let AI do the heavy lifting. I build smart automations that make your team more efficient and help your business grow.

why.heading: AI isn't the future anymore, <accent>it's now</accent>
why.subheading: Companies that use AI grow faster, work more efficiently and make better decisions.
why.cardTitle: What can AI do for your business?
why.point1: Takes repetitive work completely off your hands.
why.point2: Improve customer service with AI assistants available 24/7
why.point3: Scale your business without extra staff
why.growthText: AI helps your team focus on what really matters: strategy and growth, while repetitive work gets automated.
why.impactText: Lower costs, higher productivity and better customer satisfaction.

features.heading: Our <accent>AI services</accent>
features.subheading: Custom AI solutions for every business process
features.feature1Description: Intelligent chatbots that help your customers 24/7, answer questions and generate leads.
features.feature2Description: Repetitive tasks like outreach, communication and reporting get automated.
features.feature3Description: We can build AI solutions for anything, get in touch to discuss the possibilities.

useCases.heading: How companies <accent>use AI</accent>
useCases.case1Description: AI chatbots that answer frequently asked questions and route complex cases to your team.
useCases.case2Description: Automate data entry, invoice processing, email follow-ups and other repetitive tasks.
useCases.case3Description: AI that identifies potential customers, qualifies them and handles follow-up automatically.

process.heading: From idea to <accent>working AI</accent>
process.subheading: A proven approach to successful AI implementation
process.step1Description: We analyze your current processes and identify opportunities for automation.
process.step2Description: I design an AI solution that perfectly matches your business processes.
process.step3Description: I build and train the AI models specifically for your use case.
process.step4Description: Extensive testing and optimization to guarantee the best results.
process.step5Description: Seamless integration into your workflows with training and ongoing support.

benefits.heading: What does <accent>AI automation</accent> deliver?
benefits.item1: Save one workday a week on repetitive tasks
benefits.item3: Better customer satisfaction through faster response
benefits.scanText: Curious which processes in your business can be automated? I do a free analysis and show you where AI can make an impact.

SocialProof.heading: Proven Results
SocialProof.subheading: Numbers that show what my websites and automations deliver for businesses like yours.
